rollout_controls.summary: Keep runtime controls diagnostics as the canonical rollout snapshot for preview capability state, blockers, and effective posture.
Keep queued input lifecycle work on preview-only defaults until the dedicated queue runtime milestones land.
Keep dual-path retrieval rollout fail-closed with explicit degraded diagnostics when retrieval backends are unavailable.
Keep flow orchestration and delivery arbitration controls independently switchable so runtime rollout can widen by subsystem.
Keep networked worker preview gated behind attestation-aware rollout state and disabled-by-default execution posture.

migration_tracks.surface: shared runtime preview contracts in palyra-common plus CLI/web diagnostics payloads
migration_tracks.apply: Adopt the canonical runtime preview capability names, fixture ids, and acceptance scenario ids before adding deeper business logic.
migration_tracks.rollback: Return consumers to the last validated contract set and rerun workflow regression before widening rollout again.

migration_tracks.surface: daemon config schema, runtime controls diagnostics, and configure runtime-controls flows
migration_tracks.apply: Enable a capability only after diagnostics expose its effective mode, rollout source, and activation blockers.
migration_tracks.rollback: Set the capability back to disabled or preview-only and confirm diagnostics report the downgraded posture.

migration_tracks.surface: workflow regression matrix, shared fixtures, and deterministic core smoke coverage
migration_tracks.apply: Land the canonical contract scenarios first, then add deeper runtime scenarios behind the full profile without weakening the fast profile.
migration_tracks.rollback: Revert to the contract-only matrix and keep fast profile green while deeper runtime scenarios are repaired.

known_limitations.summary: Fast workflow regression intentionally validates contract wiring first; richer queue, replay, and child-runtime behavior lands in later milestones.
The fast profile keeps merge safety high, but degraded retrieval, flow runtime, and worker preview evidence must still pass in the full profile before wider rollout.
Networked worker execution remains non-default and attestation-gated; the current harness validates inventory and lifecycle readiness, not general remote execution.

evidence.summary: Per-push workflow regression must keep every canonical runtime preview acceptance scenario wired through deterministic contract coverage.
Full workflow regression must keep the contract baseline plus deeper runtime diagnostics, flow, and worker preview coverage green.
Deterministic core smoke must keep the runtime acceptance contract suite wired on Unix runners.
Deterministic core smoke must keep the runtime acceptance contract suite wired on Windows runners.
Push CI must continue running the fast workflow regression profile.
Nightly and release regression must continue running the full workflow regression profile.
Shared runtime acceptance scenarios and fixtures must stay centralized in palyra-common.
